creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to roker from comment #1)

Hello,

port is at 4.5.2 and it includes a security bugfix mentioned in https://www.qbittorrent.org/news

Also, didn't found any CVE related to this on https://www.opencve.io/cve?vendor=qbittorrent so we could close this PR.

Thanks
